task_completion.description: Navigate to the Jitsi Meet room 'ConfidentialBoardRoom'
task_completion.visual_evidence: A web browser is open to http://localhost:8080/ConfidentialBoardRoom and the Jitsi Meet interface is visible.

task_completion.description: Open the Security Options dialog in Jitsi Meet
task_completion.visual_evidence: The 'Security Options' dialog box is open and visible in the Jitsi Meet interface, displaying settings for Lobby Mode, Password, and End-to-End Encryption.
The toggle switch for End-to-End Encryption (E2EE) within the Security Options dialog is clicked and set to the 'On' or 'Enabled' state.

task_completion.description: Save a screenshot of the security options
task_completion.visual_evidence: Evidence of a screenshot being taken or saved to '/home/ga/security_options_screenshot.png', such as a screenshot utility UI, a terminal command (e.g., scrot, import, gnome-screenshot), or the file visible in a file manager.

task_completion.description: Document findings in a formatted text report
task_completion.visual_evidence: A text editor or terminal output showing the creation of '/home/ga/security_audit.txt'. The content must include the header 'JITSI MEET SECURITY AUDIT REPORT' and the required 'SECURITY FEATURES STATUS' section with evaluated statuses.

integrity.description: The agent interacted with the actual Jitsi Meet web interface to check settings
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots must show a real web browser rendering the Jitsi Meet GUI and Security Options dialog, not just terminal curl commands or text-based API responses.

integrity.description: The agent captured a real screenshot of the GUI rather than creating a dummy image file
integrity.visual_evidence: The trajectory should show the Security Options dialog open on the screen at the moment the screenshot utility is invoked.

integrity.description: The agent filled in the actual status values in the report rather than copying the raw template
integrity.visual_evidence: The text report should show actual evaluated states (e.g., 'Enabled' or 'Not Set') instead of the literal placeholder brackets like '[Available/Not Available]' from the prompt.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Room Name: ConfidentialBoardRoom. URL: http://localhost:8080/ConfidentialBoardRoom. The agent must create a screenshot at '/home/ga/security_options_screenshot.png' and a text report at '/home/ga/security_audit.txt'. The report must contain the exact keywords: 'ConfidentialBoardRoom', 'E2EE', 'Lobby', 'Password', and 'SECURITY FEATURES STATUS'.
